goal: KongCode — substrate-does-the-work. Every write auto-seals. Every hook fires end-to-end. Every signal lands.

0.5.0.theme: Observability — daily rollups + anomaly-only health injection (E2 + E3)
ships: New table orchestrator_metrics_daily — one row per day, populated by a turn-driven rollup pass on the first Stop after midnight UTC
src/engine/observability.ts (~280 lines): rollupDailyMetrics, pruneRawMetrics (30d retention on raw), computeTrends (E2), detectAnomalies (E3), formatAnomalyBlock, makeCooldownState
introspect tool: new 'trends' action emits per-day rolling means table + window summary
UserPromptSubmit: prepends [kongcode-alert] block ONLY when an absolute-threshold anomaly fires — no noise on healthy turns
4 anomaly detectors enabled: substrate.embedding_gap, substrate.pending_work_buildup, gate.graduation_ready, gate.graduation_close

Statistical z-score detectors (perf.token_balloon, perf.duration_spike, quality.tool_failure_spike, quality.retrieval_dropping, substrate.writes_stalled) deferred to 0.5.1 — need ~7d of orchestrator_metrics_daily history to calibrate baselines without false positives
Severity-tiered cooldowns: 1h critical / 24h warn / 7d info — same flag never spams every turn
13 new observability tests covering rollup idempotency, trend math, each detector, cooldown semantics, formatter shape

orchestrator_metrics.actual_tokens_in/out now populate from the transcript instead of staying at 0 — readTurnTokenUsage() walks the JSONL bottom-up summing assistant output_tokens until the previous user prompt and captures latest input_tokens (incl. cache_read + cache_creation)
Stop hook calls it after readLatestAssistantText so the same tail-read serves both
4 new transcript-reader tests covering input/output split, turn boundary detection, missing-fields fallback, missing-file safety
getQualitySignals retrieval-util now windows to last 14 days (was GROUP ALL — all-time mean across every outcome ever, which a single bad week could permanently drag down)
Skill success / critical reflections / tool failure rates stay all-time — they don't suffer the same poisoning
Diagnostic text now includes '(last 14 days)' so introspect output makes the window obvious
Regression test pinning the 14d clause in the SQL so windowing can't be silently dropped
Stale-MCP reaper: sweepStaleSockets() now SIGTERMs live sibling MCPs whose sockets aren't the newest, so zombies don't linger after Claude Code restarts
Opt-out for multi-window users via KONGCODE_KEEP_SIBLINGS=1 (single-window is the default)
4 new reaper tests covering SIGTERM + opt-out + own-pid safety + dead-PID path
Version + test-count badges aligned to current state
progress.json rewritten to reflect post-0.4.2 substrate-alive milestones

0.4.2.theme: Substrate connectivity hardening — UserPromptSubmit, PostToolUse, Stop
ships: UserPromptSubmit now reads payload.prompt (canonical Claude Code field) with payload.user_prompt fallback
PostToolUse now reads payload.tool_response (canonical) with payload.tool_result fallback; handles object + string shapes
PostToolUse now wires recordToolOutcome(!isError) — failure detected from payload.error or tool_response.is_error
Stop hook now reads transcript_path → readLatestAssistantText → ingestTurn (awaited) → evaluateRetrieval, closing the retrieval-quality loop
New tail-read transcript reader (256 KB window) for long-running session efficiency
16 new regression tests pinning the canonical Claude Code payload-field contract for the highest-fired hook handlers
Transport connect → initialize ordering fixed (issue #4)
Auto-seal contract: every commitKnowledge() write fires concept/memory/artifact/turn edges
6 new MCP tools: memory_health, link_hierarchy, supersede, record_finding, cluster_scan, what_is_missing
postflight() wired into Stop hook (orchestrator_metrics now populates)
Subagent tracking v1
Bootstrap version-tagging + legacy-install cleanup
Pre-push test gate

verified_live: Assistant turns ingesting on Stop via transcript_path
+0.2 toolBoost in computeSignals lifting utilization on tool-completing turns
Auto-seal still firing across concept/memory/artifact writes

0.5.1.statistical_anomaly_detectors: perf.token_balloon, perf.duration_spike, quality.tool_failure_spike, quality.retrieval_dropping, substrate.writes_stalled — need ~7d of orchestrator_metrics_daily rollups to calibrate z-score baselines
0.5.1.embedding_gap_hysteresis: Add 'AND not improving over last hour' to substrate.embedding_gap to prevent false positives during legitimate ingestion bursts

0.6.0_or_later.H_write_time_dedup: Observe Stage B effects in production first
0.6.0_or_later.subagent_v2_artifact_attribution: Thread active subagent_id through after-tool-call + post-tool-use
0.6.0_or_later.issue_2_shared_daemon: Multi-MCP Option B — shared daemon pattern for >1 Claude Code window
0.6.0_or_later.preflight_self_tuning: Close the predicted-vs-actual loop — auto-tune adaptive config from orchestrator_metrics history

operational_notes: IDENTITY_VERSION (0.4.1) is decoupled from package.json — bump only when IDENTITY_CHUNKS content changes; substrate-only releases (0.4.2/0.4.3) leave it untouched to avoid needless re-seeds.
BOOTSTRAP_VERSION (0.4.0) is similarly content-tied, not release-tied.
Hook proxy picks newest-PID-alive socket; on multi-MCP installs the older MCPs become unreachable until killed (see stale_mcp_reaper above).
After dist updates, a new MCP must be spawned (close+reopen Claude Code) — Node doesn't hot-reload.
